title: wolfhsm/src/crypto: ECC P-256, Ed25519, Curve25519 modules
description: Create wolfhsm/src/crypto/mod.rs and three modules: ecc.rs (EccP256Key: generate, evict, sign_digest, verify_digest, ecdh, export_public_der), ed25519.rs (Ed25519Key: generate, evict, sign, verify - no shim), curve25519.rs (Curve25519Key: generate, evict, diffie_hellman). All key types store KeyId, take &mut Client.
